title: Double-equal (==) operator not working as intended

features.name: comparison operator in continuous assignment for clock
features.description: Code should include a comparison using == operator in a continuous assignment where the result is used as a clock signal

features.name: reduction operator for clock generation
features.description: Code should include a reduction operator with unary ~^ (xnor) in continuous assignment used as clock signal

features.name: always_ff with clock from comparison
features.description: Code should include an always_ff procedural block where the clock is generated from a comparison result
